---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
Describe the feature and why it matters.

## Checklist
- [ ] Labels assigned
- [ ] Project added if needed
- [ ] Milestone assigned if needed
- [ ] Related issue or PR will be linked

## Problem
What problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposal
What should change?

## Notes
Anything else reviewers should know.

## Pull Request Link
```md
Closes #<issue-number>
Fixes #<issue-number>
Resolves #<issue-number>
```
